fertilizer_compatibility.name: Muriate of Potash (0-0-60)

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Foliar Liquid Fertilizer (NPK)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Bypasses saline soil nutrient barriers entirely; direct leaf absorption maintains nutrition despite salt-impaired root function

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Nanobiofertilizer

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Urea (46-0-0)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Improves salinity tolerance by boosting plant vigor; split N application helps manage salt-nitrogen interaction in saline soils

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Organic Root Exudate Mix

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Biofertilizer (Liquid Concentrate)

fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Helps overcome early saline stress through balanced nutrition; phosphorus improves ion uptake selectivity at establishment

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Ammonium Sulfate (21-0-0)

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Azolla microphylla

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Muriate of Potash (0-0-60)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Reduces salt toxicity through K-Na antagonism; explicitly critical fertilizer for saline-tolerant varieties like Salinas 7

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Foliar Liquid Fertilizer (NPK)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Effective when roots are salt-stressed; K foliar spray directly maintains K:Na ratio in leaves, compensating for impaired root uptake

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Nanobiofertilizer
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Algae-derived osmolytes help plants tolerate salt stress; nano-nutrients support ion homeostasis in saline soil

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Organic Root Exudate Mix
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Exudate compounds improve Na displacement from exchange sites; organic matter reduces Na toxicity near the root zone

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Biofertilizer (Liquid Concentrate)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Potassium oxide component helps maintain K:Na ratio in salt-stressed plants; reduces ion toxicity effects directly

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Urea (46-0-0)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Supports saline-stress recovery; nitrogen promotes new tiller production after salt damage to restore canopy

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Complete (14-14-14)
fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Provides nutritional buffer against salinity at establishment; potassium content improves salt tolerance mechanisms

fertilizer_compatibility.name: Ammonium Sulfate (21-0-0)
